title: Advisory Note: Assessment of Bias in AI Resume Screening Tools
summary: Mock regulator warning regarding synthetic hiring algorithms that filter candidates based on language pattern disparities, potentially creating systematic bias against non-native speakers.
legal_implications: AI-driven automated resume filters must be audited regularly under mock governance rules to avoid discriminatory disparate impact.
governance_lessons: Always verify that AI filters do not enforce rigid, unhedged linguistic proxies for qualifications.
